title: Cleanup buildah code
body:
1. Sort options so they are in alphabet order
2. Remove extra lines of code for options parsing that really do not accomplish anything.
3. Remove variables when they are not necesary, IE Don't create a variable to hold an
option that is only used once, use the option instead.

comments.body: bot, retest please
@jlebon Is testing hosed up?
bot, retest this please

Looks like the test is suffering from some kind of version wonkiness.
```
not ok 45 buildah version up to date in .spec file
# (in test file ./version.bats, line 15)
#   `test "$bversion" = "$rversion"' failed
```
Lets merge https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/269 to fix the version issue, which I caused.  :^(
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 62fc484) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

@TomSweeneyRedHat @nalind Now passes Tests PTAL
@umohnani8 PTAL
One possible small change, and a fence sitting question.  Otherwise LGTM.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Fixed.
@mheon PTAL

As someone who hasn't used buildah much, I have some issues with some of the argument usage strings, which don't really explain much to me about how they're used. Code looks like a massive improvement, though.

@mheon @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL, 
Lets keep signaturepolicy confersation separate from this patch, I will open a new PR as soon as this gets merged.
LGTM. Thanks for cleaning up the usage text @rhatdan - it's a lot more clear now than it was previously
I do like when you tpyo typo :^)

https://answers.yahoo.com/question/index;_ylt=A0LEViR6UMpZMc8Ax1UnnIlQ;_ylu=X3oDMTBydWNmY2MwBGNvbG8DYmYxBHBvcwM0BHZ0aWQDBHNlYwNzcg--?qid=20081121134801AAkf5YF&p=supercedes

"Supercede has occurred as a spelling variant of supersede since the 17th century, and it is common in current published writing. It continues, however, to be widely regarded as an error."

" Supercede comes from the same Latin root as intercede, cessation etc
SuperSede is a new dumb Americanism
Who prints the dictionaries these days? Check an English dictionary!!"
http://www.dictionary.com/browse/supercede?s=t
@TomSweeneyRedHat Also changed to supersedes, since I had to repush.
LGTM, one small casing issue that can be fixed later if you want
oops didn't see your latest comment.   LGTM, ship the bad boy
@rh-atomic-bot r@TomSweeneyRedHat 90630a5
I'll bite, what's the last comment supposed to do?  The changes called out in the  90630a5  link LGTM fwiw.  If you need me to push other buttons, please let me know.

Heh, yeah it's tricky. The syntax here is: `@rh-atomic-bot r=<username_without_leading_@> [optional SHA]`. Note that the `[optional SHA]` has to be just that, not a link to a GitHub commit. See https://homu-projectatomic-ci-infra.e8ca.engint.openshiftapps.com/ for full documentation.
